evals.prompt: Add Jest tests for src/constants.js. Cover the key numeric and string constants.
evals.expected_output: A src/constants.test.js file with describe blocks per constant group and individual test assertions that all pass.
assertions: Creates src/constants.test.js next to the source file
Tests pass when running npm test
Uses describe blocks to group related constants
APP_VERSION is tested as a non-empty string
At least one timing constant (e.g. TIMER_INTERVAL_MS) is verified to be a positive number

evals.prompt: Write Jest tests for the cellTemplate object in src/data/data.js.
evals.expected_output: A src/data/data.test.js file (or additions to it) that verifies cellTemplate's boolean flags all default to false and minesAround defaults to 0.
assertions: Test file is created or updated at src/data/data.test.js
Tests pass when running npm test
All 7 boolean flags (opened, mine, flagged, defused, blownUp, rightFlagged, wrongFlagged) are asserted to be false
Uses a describe block named after 'cellTemplate'

evals.prompt: Add Jest tests that verify historyTemplate in src/data/data.js has the correct initial values.
evals.expected_output: Tests in src/data/data.test.js verifying historyTemplate's zero-counters and Infinity bestTime.
assertions: Test file is created or updated at src/data/data.test.js
Tests pass when running npm test
bestTime is asserted to be Infinity (not null, not 0)
All numeric counter fields (gamesPlayed, gamesWon, longestWinStreak, longestLoseStreak, currentWinStreak, currentLoseStreak) are asserted to be 0
Uses a describe block named after 'historyTemplate'
